macro_context.market_sentiment: Risk-off environment. AVAX down significantly from 2025 highs, trading at ~$9.58 — a very deep drawdown. AVAX has underperformed broader market due to competition from Solana and reduced Avalanche subnet activity.
macro_context.btc_dominance: ~57-59% BTC dominance, near multi-year highs. Alt-heavy assets like AVAX suffer disproportionately.
macro_context.total_market_cap: Total crypto ~$2.60T per current data. AVAX market cap ~$4B at current prices.
macro_context.fear_greed_index: 29/100 = Fear (as of April 20, 2026). Deep fear phase — worst for high-beta alts.
macro_context.fed_outlook: Fed holding at 3.5-3.75%, only one 25bp cut expected all year. Risk assets under pressure.
macro_context.institutional_flows: Limited dedicated AVAX institutional flow. Some interest via Amazon Web Services Avalanche partnership for enterprise blockchain. Avalanche9000 upgrade attracting new subnet deployments.
macro_context.regulatory: AVAX classified as potential commodity. Ava Labs maintaining compliance posture. CLARITY Act Senate markup (week of April 27) a key catalyst for all smart contract platforms.
key_events: Avalanche9000 upgrade impact on subnet economics

ticker_news.headline: AVAX falls to $9 zone — 90%+ drawdown from ATH creates deep value argument
Avalanche9000 upgrade reduces subnet costs by 99%, driving new subnet launches
Amazon Web Services deepens Avalanche integration for enterprise blockchain
AVAX DeFi TVL at $1B+, showing resilience despite price weakness
Avalanche Teleporter cross-chain messaging enabling new DeFi primitives
AVAX staking yield at 8%+ attracting yield-focused holders

on_chain_signals.whale_activity: AVAX whale accumulation noted at these price levels. Large wallets seen buying dips below $10. Some concern about Ava Labs unlock schedule.
on_chain_signals.funding_rates: AVAX perpetual funding deeply negative (-0.03% to -0.05%). Heavy short positioning — significant short squeeze potential if catalyst emerges.
on_chain_signals.exchange_flows: Net outflows from exchanges at current price levels. Supply moving to staking (8%+ APY incentivizes this).

development_activity: Ava Labs very active on Avalanche9000, Interchain Token Service, and subnet tooling. HyperSDK for high-performance custom VMs. Warp messaging for native cross-chain. AWS/enterprise integrations ongoing. Monthly developer count stable.
upcoming_catalysts: CLARITY Act passage (April/May 2026). AVAX ETF applications. Avalanche9000 subnet ecosystem growth. Enterprise blockchain deployments via AWS. DeFi activity recovery when risk appetite returns. Short squeeze potential from heavy short positioning.
